customManagers.description: GitHub Actions runner version baked into the Tart runner image. Bumps land as `fix(runner-image): …` commits which release.yml's release-runner-image flow picks up to rebuild the image, push a new semver tag, resolve the digest, and rewrite the runnersFleet.runnerImage pin in managed-env values files.

ARG-based version pins in the Linux runner image (actions/runner, kubectl, helm). Bumps land as `fix(linux-runner-image): …` commits which release.yml's release-linux-runner-image flow picks up to rebuild + push + rewrite the runnersFleetLinux pin.

packageRules.description: actions/runner bumps: route through the runner-image release flow.
Linux-runner-image ARG bumps (actions/runner, kubectl, helm): route through the linux-runner-image release flow.
